provenance.generation_method: Targeted robustness upgrade on locked v1.1 baseline
provenance.upgrade_policy: Additive only; no deletions or modifications to existing evidence
provenance.retrieval_policy: Case-specific peer-reviewed sources; no shared sources within case families
provenance.hallucination_policy: Strict no fabrication; sources retrieved via web search
provenance.validation_status: 37 complete at acceptable+ robustness, 2 insufficient with monitoring flags
